faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documents are required for registration?
faq.a1: You will need your diploma, professional card, and ID. These documents will be verified during the integration process.
faq.a2: Rates will be communicated when official registration opens. Pre-registration is free and without commitment.
faq.a3: You set your own consultation rates. OmniCare takes a commission on each consultation conducted via the platform.
faq.q4: Can I manage my schedule freely?
faq.a4: Absolutely. You have full control over your availability slots and can modify them at any time.

flexibility.title: Total flexibility

tools.description: Benefit from modern and efficient management tools

step1.title: Sign up

tunisia.title: Made in Tunisia
tunisia.subtitle: A 100% Tunisian solution
tunisia.description1: OmniCare is designed by Tunisians, for Tunisians. We understand the specificities of the Tunisian healthcare system, local needs and the challenges faced by patients and professionals.
tunisia.description2: Our platform is adapted to the Tunisian context: support in French and Arabic, integration with local health systems, and partnerships with Tunisian medical institutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Revolutionizing access to healthcare in Tunisia

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading telemedicine platform in Tunisia, offering quality services accessible to all.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide each of our actions

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Healthcare for everyone, everywhere in Tunisia

innovation.title: Innovation
